title: QLD Ranger App Backend - Backend API for Ranger Communication
description: A collaborative back end system for a communication and file-sharing platform for a Queensland Government initiative.

title: Movie Ratings Search App (In Progress)
description: A movie search and ratings-comparison app, built to practice front-end architecture and third-party API integration. Actively in development.

title: CarID - Blockchain Vehicle Registry (In Progress)
description: A smart-contract-based vehicle registration system on Ethereum, extending patterns from an earlier blockchain pet-registry project built during university coursework.
